blended.narrative: Silver Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.6 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,943 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
